title: New Diamonds
description: Adds 8 new diamond colors, with full tool and armor sets for each!
body:
New Diamond adds exactly what the title says, new diamonds colors!

Pink, Yellow, White, and Black diamonds can be found anywhere between  levels 10 and -64

Red Diamonds can be found in the Badlands between levels 10 and -64

Orange diamonds can be found in Taiga biomes between levels 10 and -64

Green Diamonds can be found in Jungles between levels 10 and -64

Purple Diamonds can be found in Mountains between levels 10 and -64

 
This mod is a spin off of my larger mod "Cal's Extra Gems"! New Diamonds can be played seperetely from the main mod.
